item.title: A Deadly Love Triangle and a Twisted Cyberstalker
item.description: What started as a casual relationship quickly spiraled into years of terrifying messages, threats, and manipulation. Dave Kroupa reported being harassed by his girlfriend Cari Farver, who suddenly claimed she had moved away but continued sending thousands of obsessive texts and emails. As the harassment intensified, another woman in Dave’s life, Liz Golyar, appeared to be another victim. But when investigators dug deeper, they uncovered a web of deception far more disturbing than anyone imagined. This case reveals how digital stalking, identity manipulation, and obsession turned deadly behind the scenes.

media:content.media:title: A Deadly Love Triangle and a Twisted Cyberstalker
media:content.media:description: What started as a casual relationship quickly spiraled into years of terrifying messages, threats, and manipulation. Dave Kroupa reported being harassed by his girlfriend Cari Farver, who suddenly claimed she had moved away but continued sending thousands of obsessive texts and emails. As the harassment intensified, another woman in Dave’s life, Liz Golyar, appeared to be another victim. But when investigators dug deeper, they uncovered a web of deception far more disturbing than anyone imagined. This case reveals how digital stalking, identity manipulation, and obsession turned deadly behind the scenes.

item.title: Attacked With a Shovel and Left for Dead. Years Later, She Helped Catch Him.
item.description: At just 17 years old, Brittani Marcell was brutally attacked in her own home and left with life altering injuries. For years, the case went cold as investigators struggled to identify the man responsible. But Brittani never stopped searching for answers. Through memory, persistence, and a determination to face her trauma head on, she played a key role in helping authorities finally track down her attacker. This is the story of survival, resilience, and how one young woman helped bring justice in her own case.

media:content.media:title: Attacked With a Shovel and Left for Dead. Years Later, She Helped Catch Him.
media:content.media:description: At just 17 years old, Brittani Marcell was brutally attacked in her own home and left with life altering injuries. For years, the case went cold as investigators struggled to identify the man responsible. But Brittani never stopped searching for answers. Through memory, persistence, and a determination to face her trauma head on, she played a key role in helping authorities finally track down her attacker. This is the story of survival, resilience, and how one young woman helped bring justice in her own case.

item.title: What Happened in the Utah Desert? The Moab Murders of Kylen Schulte and Crystal Turner
item.description: Kylen Schulte and Crystal Turner were newlyweds living out of a van and working seasonal jobs near Moab, Utah, when they told friends someone had been making them uncomfortable at a local campsite. Days later, the couple was found shot to death in the desert. With early investigative missteps, overlapping timelines with other high profile cases, and lingering questions about potential suspects, their murders shocked the outdoor community. Who targeted Kylen and Crystal, and could this tragedy have been prevented?

media:content.media:title: What Happened in the Utah Desert? The Moab Murders of Kylen Schulte and Crystal Turner
media:content.media:description: Kylen Schulte and Crystal Turner were newlyweds living out of a van and working seasonal jobs near Moab, Utah, when they told friends someone had been making them uncomfortable at a local campsite. Days later, the couple was found shot to death in the desert. With early investigative missteps, overlapping timelines with other high profile cases, and lingering questions about potential suspects, their murders shocked the outdoor community. Who targeted Kylen and Crystal, and could this tragedy have been prevented?

item.title: Who Killed Georgia Leah Moses?
item.description: In 1997, 12 year old Georgia Leah Moses was found dead in North Carolina after being reported missing. Authorities initially dismissed her death as an accident, but her family never believed that explanation. Decades later, her little sister has continued to push for justice, uncovering overlooked evidence, questionable investigative decisions, and signs that the case may have been mishandled from the start. After 25 years, the fight to learn who killed Georgia Leah Moses is far from over.

media:content.media:title: Who Killed Georgia Leah Moses?
media:content.media:description: In 1997, 12 year old Georgia Leah Moses was found dead in North Carolina after being reported missing. Authorities initially dismissed her death as an accident, but her family never believed that explanation. Decades later, her little sister has continued to push for justice, uncovering overlooked evidence, questionable investigative decisions, and signs that the case may have been mishandled from the start. After 25 years, the fight to learn who killed Georgia Leah Moses is far from over.

item.title: The Case Against Michael McKee in the Shocking Tepe Family Case
item.description: The Tepe family case stunned their community, and investigators quickly focused on Michael McKee. Prosecutors say the evidence tells a clear story, while the defense insists key details have been misunderstood. With conflicting accounts, forensic questions, and a timeline under scrutiny, this case has left many wondering what really happened and whether justice will ultimately be served.

media:content.media:title: The Case Against Michael McKee in the Shocking Tepe Family Case
media:content.media:description: The Tepe family case stunned their community, and investigators quickly focused on Michael McKee. Prosecutors say the evidence tells a clear story, while the defense insists key details have been misunderstood. With conflicting accounts, forensic questions, and a timeline under scrutiny, this case has left many wondering what really happened and whether justice will ultimately be served.
